description: Official TypeScript/JavaScript SDK for StripFeed. Convert any URL to clean, token-efficient Markdown for AI agents, RAG pipelines, and LLM workflows.
rules: Create client: const sf = new StripFeed('sf_live_your_api_key')
sf.fetch(url, options?) returns full result with markdown, tokens, metadata
sf.fetchMarkdown(url, options?) returns only the Markdown string
sf.batch(urls, options?) fetches up to 10 URLs in parallel (Pro plan)
sf.usage() checks current monthly API usage and plan limits
Options: selector, format, model, cache, ttl, maxTokens
Errors are thrown as StripFeedError with status and message properties
